text.title: Chaos Engineering Practice for Infra Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when chaos-engineering-practice-for-infra is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: First experiment kills production for 40 minutes.
antipattern.reason: Blast radius unbounded; abort criteria untested.
antipattern.note: Fix: Start in a non-prod env that mirrors prod traffic; graduate; test abort criteria first.

antipattern.description: Experiments run but no regression tests are written.
antipattern.reason: Learning loop incomplete; team moves to next shiny chaos.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add 'regression test PR filed' to experiment DoD; block close otherwise.

antipattern.description: GameDays become annual theatre instead of quarterly practice.
antipattern.note: Fix: Bake GameDays into the engineering OKRs; recurring calendar invite owned by SRE lead.
